headline: 3 Dividend Stocks That Pass Buffett’s Test: Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: Costco, Fastenal, and Visa all pass Warren Buffett's classic quality screen, but passing the quality test and clearing the valuation bar are two very different things. One of these compounders is a trap at current prices, one deserves patience, and one looks like the setup Buffett himself would recognize.

headline: Why Costco's Warehouse Growth Story Is Far From Over
summary: Costco plans 26 net-new warehouses in fiscal 2026 as U.S. relocations and a deep international pipeline extend its growth runway.

headline: Price Prediction: Will Costco Hit a New-High This Year?
summary: Costco just pulled back from a 52-week high while still putting up double-digit comp growth and a 90% membership renewal rate. Whether that dip is a warning sign or a rare entry point depends on which force wins out.
